description: Configures Azure Monitor diagnostic settings to stream Entra ID audit and sign-in logs to Log Analytics and/or Storage Accounts. Equivalent to Okta event hooks — provides audit trail, security monitoring, and compliance log archival.

risk_profile_effects.standard: No log streaming enabled by default. Can be manually enabled.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: Audit log streaming enabled. Sign-in log streaming disabled (can be enabled manually).
risk_profile_effects.strict: Both audit and sign-in log streaming enabled. Full visibility into all directory and authentication events.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Controls which log streams are enabled by default.

enable_audit_log_streaming.label: Enable Audit Log Streaming
enable_audit_log_streaming.client_description: Stream Entra ID audit logs (directory changes, role assignments, policy modifications) to your monitoring destination. Essential for security monitoring and compliance. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

enable_sign_in_log_streaming.label: Enable Sign-In Log Streaming
enable_sign_in_log_streaming.client_description: Stream Entra ID sign-in logs (all authentication events) to your monitoring destination. High volume — consider storage costs. Leave blank to use your risk profile default.

log_analytics_workspace_id.label: Log Analytics Workspace ID
log_analytics_workspace_id.client_description: Azure Log Analytics workspace resource ID for log streaming. Enables KQL querying, alerting, and integration with Microsoft Sentinel. Required if either log stream is enabled.

storage_account_id.label: Storage Account ID
storage_account_id.client_description: Azure Storage Account resource ID for long-term log archival. Provides cost-effective retention for compliance. Audit logs retained 365 days, sign-in logs retained 90 days.

outputs.audit_log_stream_id: Diagnostic setting ID for audit log stream (null if not created)
outputs.sign_in_log_stream_id: Diagnostic setting ID for sign-in log stream (null if not created)
outputs.audit_log_streaming_enabled: Whether audit log streaming is active
outputs.sign_in_log_streaming_enabled: Whether sign-in log streaming is active
